meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solving Debugging Bottlenecks for Devs
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver flawless projects faster.
content.answer_block: When you can't debug code, you lose billable hours and client trust. The solution is shifting from manual debugging to AI-assisted resolution via Antigravity and Claude Code. By pitching these advanced diagnostic workflows as a premium service, you turn technical blockers into high-value deliverables that justify higher freelance rates.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. Your local environment throws a cryptic stack trace that defies logic, and your client’s deadline is breathing down your neck. You are trapped in a loop of trial-and-error, watching your profit margins evaporate as the hours tick away on a bug you cannot solve. This is the silent killer of freelance careers: the inability to debug at scale.

But what if you didn't have to solve it alone? By integrating AI-driven diagnostic tools, you shift from a 'struggling coder' to a 'systems architect' in the eyes of your clients. This case study reveals the blueprint for using Antigravity and Claude Code to offload the heavy lifting, allowing you to pitch reliability and speed as your core value proposition.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure State
steps.description: Before fixing, define the exact boundary of the error. Use logs to identify where the logic breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the attached error logs and identify the specific function or module causing the regression.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze logs/error.log and identify the failing module'

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Claude Code needs to understand your dependencies. Provide a clean project snapshot.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise summary of the current project architecture and dependency tree for the debugger.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use AI to trace the execution path and pinpoint the logic flaw.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a step-by-step trace of the execution flow leading to the identified error and propose three potential fixes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'trace execution flow for the failed function and suggest fixes'

steps.title: Implement Verified Patches
steps.description: Apply the fix in a sandbox environment before merging to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a unit test that fails on the current error and passes once the proposed fix is applied.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create test for the fix and apply it if tests pass'

steps.title: Pitch the 'Resilience' Audit
steps.description: Package this debugging process as a 'Code Health Audit' to upsell your clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional email to a client explaining how this debugging audit improved their system stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'draft a client report summarizing the fix and system improvements'

pro_tips: Always maintain a separate 'debug branch' when using AI agents to prevent polluting your production history.
Use Claude Code's `--verbose` flag to understand the reasoning process behind the AI's suggested refactors.
Frame your debugging work as 'System Optimization' to clients; it sounds more proactive and valuable than 'fixing broken code'.
Keep your prompt library in Antigravity updated with common boilerplate fixes for your specific tech stack.
Use the AI to write documentation for the bug fix; this builds massive trust and makes you look like a senior architect.
content.next_steps: Run a diagnostic on your current project using these tools, document the improvement in a case study, and pitch it to your next prospective client.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your income and start controlling your freelance workflow with precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
